posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Change column ID after column creation instead of only before.

What are you trying to achieve

Creating columns via the popup isn’t always ideal. In addition, I’d like the opportunity to change column ID after column creation.
